message:
feat: comprehensive destructive command guard improvements

Core Modules:
- agent.rs: Enhanced agent detection and context awareness
- cli.rs: Improved CLI argument parsing and help messages
- config.rs: Refined configuration with new guard patterns
- hook.rs: Better git hook integration and pre-commit validation
- main.rs: Updated main entry with improved initialization
- simulate.rs: Enhanced dry-run simulation for testing guards

These changes strengthen the guard's ability to detect and
prevent destructive operations across diverse command patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
